title: NOAA Severe Weather
description: A NOAA source card about thunderstorms, tornadoes, hurricanes, floods, and weather safety.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA severe weather resources gather explainers and learning materials about hazardous weather events and how communities prepare for them.
Use this source for nonfiction reading that links science concepts with emergency planning, risk communication, and local decision-making.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
